//: OpenLane (or OpenLane2) config for a full sky130 P&R PPA run of the Full IOMMU config.
//run: Run sv2v first (syn/synth.py or synth_osic.py emits syn/build/full.v), then point OpenLane here.
//performance-knobs: these drive buffering / sizing so high-fanout nets (e.g. the fanout-466 CAM reduction) get fixed
//note-library: high-speed cells would be STD_CELL_LIBRARY=sky130_fd_sc_hs (needs a full open_pdks build; this volare build ships only sc_hd). High performance: tighter CLOCK_PERIOD + SYNTH_STRATEGY=DELAY + max-fanout/transition constraints + (optional) SYNTH_SIZING/resizer.
//note-sram: for the SRAM-macro storage pattern, add the sky130 SRAM macros (EXTRA_LEFS/EXTRA_LIBS) and set the cache STORAGE=sram params + macro instantiation (later sub-experiment).
